ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location mentioned in the article */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country mentioned in the article */,
  "is_relevant" INTEGER /* Relevance of the article */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target mentioned in the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source mentioned in the article */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action mentioned in the article */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action mentioned in the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of article (e.g., news, blog, research) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or sub-continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., organization, individual, location) */,
  "entity_subtype" TEXT /* Sub-type of entity (e.g., government organization, non-governmental organization) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the entity in the article */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "entity1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first entity in the relationship */,
  "entity2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second entity in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., affiliation, association) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the relationship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_entity2_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity2_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_entity1_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity1_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_entity_mentions" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article where the entity is mentioned */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity mentioned in the article */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., main subject, supporting detail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_relationship_mentions" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article where the relationship is mentioned */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship mentioned in the article */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., main subject, supporting detail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "relationship_id")
)
